title: Austin Move — Packing List + Goodbyes
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir checking off the Austin move logistics: apartment locked, Minecraft-tools job lined up, gym TBD between Lift ATX ($50/mo, $25 to start) and Iron Forge ($55/mo, sauna).
  • Plans to leave at 10–11pm; explicitly accepts that "my mom will have limited time in Austin" and that they may have to leave Monday or Tuesday instead.
  • Goodbye list: Ann and Wayne, Tío Edgar, Las Dobles As, Grandpa Eddie / Karen, Kai, GSmitty, Vicente Palencia, dad.
  • Pre-move shopping list: silicon ice trays, mouth tape, knives, full-body mirror, dish sponge, plunger, etc.; sourced at Ross and Walmart.
  • Food-pantry research for Austin: Micah 6 (West Campus, walkable) and Hope (Central) — bridge-mode planning.

Notes

The operational artifact behind the Austin move. Two months after the On Bubbas note flagged Tío Edgar as moving to Mexico, that goodbye is now on Yahir's pre-departure checklist — meaning the family-system change registered there is being acted on here.

The note has the texture of someone moving on real money constraints: gym choice priced down to dollars, food pantries scouted before arrival, Ross + Walmart as the supply runs. The "accept and account for the fact that we will have to leave later Monday or even Tuesday" line is Yahir doing the expectation management move on his own logistics.

[REDACTED — phone numbers, locker/apartment codes stripped during privacy sweep.]

Connections

  • austin tx — destination.
  • yahir family — mom timeline ("limited time in Austin"), dad goodbye.
  • lift atx — gym option, surfaces again later as Yahir's actual choice.
  • 2025 06 21 on bubbas — Tío Edgar's Mexico departure originates there.
  • bridge income strategies — food pantry research as bridge planning.
